hero.sub: Links, projects, workflow, meetings and guides for Open Experts and collaborators of the OpenSource LATAM Commission. What you need to build and report.

recursos.p: Where the work lives. Public, except the internal channel.

items.title: GitHub Organization
items.desc: The commission's code repositories, issues and projects, openly public.

items.title: Hugging Face
items.desc: Trained models and Spanish datasets, released for the community.

items.title: WhatsApp Group
items.desc: Internal communication and daily coordination. Also where you ask an agent to build tasks.

proyectos.h2: One link for the whole team
proyectos.p: Tasks, Kanban and team in Nirvai. Views are for Open Experts.

tracking.title: Project & task list
tracking.desc: Overview board with all of the commission's projects, their tasks and the current status of each.

tracking.title: Tasks in progress
tracking.desc: Kanban view with each project's child tasks, organized by status across columns.

tracking.title: Team list
tracking.desc: Who's part of the commission. Log in with the email you registered with to get access.

proyectos.roster_p: What we're building now and who leads it.

roster.name: GRAIL
roster.desc: Benchmark and state-of-the-art evaluation of the solution, thanks to the sponsor.

roster.name: Guardrails evaluation
roster.desc: Evaluation of guardrails for AI systems.

roster.name: Scholarships scored with GRAIL
roster.desc: Evaluation of scholarship projects using GRAIL.

roster.name: Oncology center chatbot
roster.desc: Extract information or build a chatbot for cancer patients.

roster.name: Search engine · people match
roster.desc: Search engine and people matching, involving CCHIA.

proyectos.roster_soon: More projects and ideas on the way.
proyectos.note: Each project supports up to 2 levels of tasks (3 counting the project).

flujo.p: How tasks are born in Nirvai and the meeting cadence.

steps.title: Project's main task
steps.desc: Each project's main task is created beforehand by the leadership team.

steps.title: Create tasks manually
steps.desc: The Open Expert adds tasks by hand, with a maximum of 2 levels of hierarchy (3 counting the project).

steps.title: Or build them with an agent
steps.desc: They can also write the task structure in markdown inside the project page and ask via WhatsApp for an agent to build them. The Lead assigns an agent to create them.

steps.title: Weekly report in Nirvai
steps.desc: Once a week the Open Expert reports and updates their project's progress in Nirvai. No exceptions.

steps.title: Self-management with agents
steps.desc: External connections to the database so anyone can manage their work with agents when needed — like an agentic skill.

reuniones.p: A regular meeting rhythm, with an automatic progress document before each one.

cards.title: Meetings every 7 to 14 days
cards.desc: Official gathering where the commission's progress is reviewed and priorities are aligned.

cards.title: Progress document, 2 days before
cards.desc: A progress report is generated 2 days before each meeting. The Open Expert must update their project in Nirvai before that date so their work is reflected.

guias.p: Materials to join with confidence. Here's what's coming.

items.title: Onboarding
items.desc: First steps in the commission: roles, tools and how we work day to day.

items.title: Contributing on GitHub
items.desc: Forks, branches, pull requests and review flow. Base guide already available in the GRAIL repository.

items.title: Task management
items.desc: How to structure tasks in Nirvai — manually or by describing them in markdown for an agent to build.

cta.p: Two ways in: as part of CCHIA or as an external collaborator. Complete the registration and the Lead, together with the Open Experts, assigns you.

paths.title: Open Team
paths.desc: Exclusive access to CCHIA as a collaborator or Open Expert. Complete the Open Team registration to formally join a team.

paths.title: External Collaborators
paths.desc: Contribute without joining CCHIA yet. Receive mentorship and take part in projects; apply for membership after proving your commitment.

experts.title: Want to lead a project?
experts.desc: We're looking for Open Experts who can lead projects in the community. If you want to take an effort and drive it forward, reach out.

footer.tagline: OpenSource LATAM Commission · Chilean Chamber of Artificial Intelligence. Team resource hub.
